subcodes.first_line: The Hand of God hath seized, and His grace hath guided the way. Blessed is the soul who perceived the path and clung fast unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ید الله اخذ نمود و فضلش راه نمود طوبی از برای نفسیکه راه را دید و بان پیوست
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
